<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  type t
  module Body :
    sig
      type t
      val empty : Response.Body.t
      val of_string : string -> Response.Body.t
      val make :
        Cohttp.Transfer.encoding ->
        ((string -> unit Lwt.t) -> unit Lwt.t) -> Response.Body.t
      val of_cohttp :
        encoding:Cohttp.Transfer.encoding ->
        Cohttp_lwt.Body.t -> Response.Body.t
      val write : Response.Body.t -> (string -> unit Lwt.t) -> unit Lwt.t
      val transfer_encoding : Response.Body.t -> Cohttp.Transfer.encoding
    end
  val make :
    ?body:Response.Body.t ->
    ?cookies:Ocsigen_cookie_map.t -> Cohttp.Response.t -> Response.t
  val respond :
    ?headers:Cohttp.Header.t ->
    status:Http.Status.t -> ?body:Response.Body.t -> unit -> Response.t
  val respond_string :
    ?headers:Cohttp.Header.t ->
    status:Http.Status.t -> body:string -> unit -> Response.t
  val respond_error :
    ?headers:Cohttp.Header.t ->
    ?status:Http.Status.t -> body:string -> unit -> Response.t
  val respond_file :
    ?headers:Cohttp.Header.t ->
    ?status:Http.Status.t -> string -> Response.t Lwt.t
  val update :
    ?response:Cohttp.Response.t ->
    ?body:Response.Body.t ->
    ?cookies:Ocsigen_cookie_map.t -> Response.t -> Response.t
  val of_cohttp :
    ?cookies:Ocsigen_cookie_map.t ->
    Cohttp.Response.t * Cohttp_lwt.Body.t -> Response.t
  val to_response_expert :
    Response.t ->
    Cohttp.Response.t * ('ic -> Lwt_io.output_channel -> unit Lwt.t)
  val response : Response.t -> Cohttp.Response.t
  val body : Response.t -> Response.Body.t
  val status : Response.t -> Cohttp.Code.status
  val set_status : Response.t -> Cohttp.Code.status -> Response.t
  val cookies : Response.t -> Ocsigen_cookie_map.t
  val add_cookies : Response.t -> Ocsigen_cookie_map.t -> Response.t
  val header : Response.t -> Ocsigen_http.Header.Name.t -> string option
  val header_multi : Response.t -> Ocsigen_http.Header.Name.t -> string list
  val add_header :
    Response.t -> Ocsigen_http.Header.Name.t -> string -> Response.t
  val add_header_multi :
    Response.t -> Ocsigen_http.Header.Name.t -> string list -> Response.t
  val replace_header :
    Response.t -> Ocsigen_http.Header.Name.t -> string -> Response.t
  val replace_headers :
    Response.t -> (Ocsigen_http.Header.Name.t * string) list -> Response.t
  val remove_header : Response.t -> Ocsigen_http.Header.Name.t -> Response.t
end >>
